title: Baker Ross AR687 Gold & Silver Glitter Poms for Kids Christmas Crafts and Decorations (Pack of 100), Silver & Gold
features: Glitter Pompoms: Give your Christmas crafts a finishing touch with these gold and silver pompoms balls! Add winter effects to crafts, collages and displays.

Pom Pom Decorations: Glue these glitter pom poms together to form an unusual bauble, or string them up across the mantel in a festive garland. Or maybe they’ll decorate the front of a card, be turned into a headdress, or sewn onto a t-shirt as a glittery trim.
Christmas Crafts Supplies: There’s no limit to what can be done, so explore, get creative and have some fun … Sew, glue, shape and design!
Included in the Pack: Each pack contains 3 sizes - 10mm, 15mm & 20mm (0.2, 0.6, 0.8 inch). Use with glue or glue dots (not included).

Made by Experts: Baker Ross has been designing and providing art and craft supplies, and toys to schools, groups and parents for over 40 years. All products conform to General Product Safety Regulations, and state age recommendation where applicable.
description: Product Description Co-founded in 1974 by Patti Baker, Baker Ross is still a family owned and run business whose innovative ideas have led us to become one of the leading suppliers of arts & crafts to schools, playgroups and organisations in the UK. We employ over 80 dedicated and hard working staff located at our office and warehouse in Harlow, Essex. Baker Ross has been importing and distributing arts and crafts, educational and fundraising products to schools, playgroups, charities etc. in the UK and abroad by mail order since it started, and now supply thousands of different organisations every year. We currently offer over 3,000 items through our website and catalogues. Baker Ross supports ChildLine, Clic Sargent and PDSA by giving a generous lump sum donation. The Holiday Season! Get prepared for the holiday season with our Christmas crafts and toys. We’ve got so many Christmas crafts, from Nativity projects to ceramic baubles, candle crafts and more, not to mention toys and treats, you might be forgiven for thinking you’ve stumbled upon Santa’s workshop...
